name: Visual Lease Lease Management REST API
what_it_does: Visual Lease lease management and accounting REST API for corporate real estate teams, lease administrators, and accounting departments to manage real estate and equipment leases, automate ASC 842 and IFRS 16 accounting calculations, track critical dates, and generate financial disclosures — enabling automated lease administration, lease accounting journal entries, critical date management, and compliance reporting through Visual Lease's purpose-built lease lifecycle management platform. Enables AI agents to manage lease records for lease contract creation and term management automation, handle accounting calculations for ASC 842 and IFRS 16 amortization schedule automation, access critical date tracking for renewal option and expiration alert automation, retrieve journal entries for lease accounting entry generation automation, manage financial reporting for balance sheet and footnote disclosure automation, handle lease portfolio analytics for portfolio rent exposure and occupancy automation, access document storage for lease document and amendment management automation, retrieve abstraction for lease clause and data extraction automation, manage payments for rent and payment schedule management automation, and integrate Visual Lease with ERP, GL, and real estate systems for lease-to-pay automation.
use_cases: Automating ASC 842 and IFRS 16 lease accounting calculations for compliance automation agents
Tracking lease critical dates and managing renewal options for real estate automation agents
Generating lease accounting journal entries for GL integration automation agents
Reporting lease portfolio exposure and financial disclosures for finance automation agents
not_for: Property management for landlords (Visual Lease is for corporate tenants/lessees, not landlord property management)
Lease origination and underwriting (Visual Lease is lease administration, not lease origination workflow)
Short-term rentals (Visual Lease is for corporate leases with ASC 842/IFRS 16 terms, not short-term)
best_when: A corporate real estate team, accounting department, or lease administrator at a public or private company wanting AI agents to automate lease administration, ASC 842/IFRS 16 accounting compliance, and real estate portfolio management through Visual Lease's specialized lease management platform.
avoid_when: ACCOUNTING STANDARD SELECTION IS CRITICAL: ASC 842 (US GAAP) and IFRS 16 have different accounting treatments; automated single-standard assumption creates wrong_accounting for companies reporting under multiple standards; automated must configure correct accounting standard per jurisdiction. LEASE CLASSIFICATION AFFECTS ACCOUNTING: Finance vs. operating lease classification drives accounting treatment; automated uniform-classification assumption creates incorrect_journal_entries for misclassified leases; automated must correctly classify each lease. DATA MIGRATION IS COMPLEX: Migrating historical lease data requires accurate opening balances; automated clean-start assumption creates balance_sheet_error for existing lease portfolios without proper opening balance migration; automated must perform careful historical data migration. MODIFICATION TRACKING IS REQUIRED: Lease modifications (amendments) require remeasurement of ROU asset and liability; automated static-lease assumption creates accounting_error for leases with amendments not triggering remeasurement; automated must trigger modification workflow for all lease changes.

auth.notes: Visual Lease uses OAuth2 for lease management REST API. REST API with JSON. Woodbridge, NJ HQ. Founded 2000 by Neil Seiden. Products: Lease Accounting, Lease Administration, Real Estate Portfolio, Equipment Leases. Used by 1,000+ companies including enterprises and mid-market. SOC1 and SOC2 certified. Competes with LeaseAccelerator, LeaseQuery, and CoStar Real Estate for lease management and accounting compliance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified companies; production requires Visual Lease subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by lease count; Professional and Enterprise tiers; implementation services extra
pricing.notes: Woodbridge NJ. Annual subscription. 1,000+ company clients. ASC 842/IFRS 16 lease accounting specialist.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; lease and accounting APIs throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: COMMENCEMENT DATE DRIVES ACCOUNTING: Lease accounting calculations begin at commencement date; automated activation-date assumption creates wrong_opening_balance for leases with different commencement and activation dates; automated must use correct commencement date

INCREMENTAL BORROWING RATE AFFECTS CALCULATIONS: IBR (incremental borrowing rate) is a key input for lease liability calculation; automated default-rate assumption creates incorrect_liability for leases without properly configured IBR; automated must input appropriate IBR per lease

SHORT-TERM AND LOW-VALUE EXEMPTIONS: ASC 842/IFRS 16 have exemptions for short-term and low-value leases; automated universal-capitalization assumption creates over-capitalization for leases meeting exemption criteria; automated must apply correct accounting treatment for exempt leases

VARIABLE LEASE PAYMENTS REQUIRE SEPARATE HANDLING: Variable payments tied to index or rate require remeasurement; automated fixed-payment assumption creates accounting_error for variable rate leases without periodic remeasurement; automated must trigger remeasurement for index-linked leases

CRITICAL DATES REQUIRE TIMELY ACTION: Lease renewal and termination options have notification deadlines; automated indefinite-option assumption creates missed_option for leases where option windows close without action; automated must monitor and act on critical date alerts
agent_readiness.security_notes: Lease accounting. SOC1, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Corporate lease contract and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Lease management. SOC1/SOC2. OAuth2. US. Lease contract and accounting compliance data.
